subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 784717756/251113381 is not a GRB
submitter: Elisabetta Bissaldi at Politecnico and INFN Bari <elisabetta.bissaldi@ba.infn.it>
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico and INFN Bari) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 784717756 / 251113381 at 09:09:11.19 UT
on 13 November 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a solar flare."
